title: Section 7A
content: 1[7A. Abatement of certain suits.-- Notwithstanding anything contained in any other law, every suit for the specific performance of a contract for the transfer of land, instituted after the appointed day and before the commencement of the Delhi Land Holdings (Ceiling) Amendment Act, 1976 shall abate and no suit for the specific performance of any such contract entered into before such commencement shall be maintainable.]
footnote: 1. Subs. by Act 15 of 1976, s. 7, for section 7 (w.e.f. 8-12-1975).
